items.name: hoo
items.description: Hoo is a high-performance, statically-typed systems programming language and compiler ecosystem with an aggressive lowering pipeline that translates high-level object-oriented code into pure 64-bit RISC HVM v1.4. It uses LLVM ORC v2 JIT, ARC-managed runtime library, and delivers hardware-fidelity execution with zero abstraction overhead.

items.name: dark-orb
items.description: Dark-Orb is a C# project focused on experimenting with turn-based combat systems inspired by Dungeons & Dragons. The project is used to prototype and test mechanics such as initiative, abilities, status effects, damage calculation, and enemy AI in a modular combat engine.
